creator: darin@technotic.ca
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)


root@mx:~ # uname -a
FreeBSD mx.technotic.ca 12.0-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p7 GENERIC  amd64

root@mx:/usr/local/etc/openvpn/easy-rsa # ezjail-admin update -P
Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 6 mirrors found.
Fetching snapshot tag from your-org.portsnap.freebsd.org... done.
Latest snapshot on server matches what we already have.
No updates needed.
Ports tree is already up to date.

Issue is reproducible on latest ports, indeed!
